title: Section 11
content: The following shall be the officers of the University:-- (1) the Chancellor; (2) the Vice-Chancellor; (3) the Pro-Vice-Chancellor; (4) the Deans of Faculties; (5) the Registrar; (6) the Finance Officer; (7) the Controller of Examinations; (8) the Librarian; and (9) such other officers as may be declared by the Statutes to be officers of the University.
